top_signals.title: Should testosterone be in Hegseth’s build-your-own-warrior playbook?
top_signals.summary: The US administration sees scientific evidence as an optional, flexible handmaid to the more vital business of masculinity
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Innolight Seeks Up to $7 Billion in Biggest Hong Kong Listing in Years
top_signals.summary: China’s Zhongji Innolight Co. has started taking investor orders for a Hong Kong listing to raise as much as HK$55 billion ($7 billion), the city’s biggest in seven years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: TKMS Drops Out of Race to Acquire GNYK
top_signals.summary: German warship builder TKMS said on Tuesday it is no longer interested in acquiring smaller shipyard German Naval Yards, also known as GNYK.That would make German defence group Rheinmetall the only bidder currently in the running to purchase the ship maker, which has about 350 staff.Handelsblatt fir
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IRS chief Frank Bisignano dismisses JPMorgan spying allegations
top_signals.summary: Bisignano denied allegations The Wall Street Journal reported that he surveilled his colleagues while working at JPMorgan more than a decade ago.
